question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks zero didactic questions. It dumps a complete solution write-up with three approaches, walkthrough, and complexity table in one shot.

question_quality.rationale: No questions or forks are surfaced to the user. The crux (why the shorter side determines water level) is stated as exposition rather than elicited.

scaffolding.rationale: Content is reasonably structured (brute force → DP → two pointers) but everything is revealed immediately with no progressive elicitation. Spoilers throughout since the optimal solution is given upfront.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and well-organized; the user responded positively and traced through the example themselves. But there's no real back-and-forth — it's a monologue followed by the user self-teaching.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
